sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10324" key="a)ntiperai/nomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπεραίνομαι</orth>, <sense id="n10324.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accomplish in turn,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ δρᾶν καὶ τὸ παθεῖν,</foreign> sens. obsc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.238</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
